unit.name: WP_Http request nonblocking response shape
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the native array/null/false response shape returned by WP_Http::request when blocking=false after Requests dispatch and debug/error handling. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, argument defaults, filters, preempt/error paths, streaming, header/cookie/SSL/proxy options, Requests::request dispatch, exception conversion, http_api_debug timing, is_wp_error handling, and the surrounding request orchestration.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
